Preserve a departing teammate
This flow requires participation from your departing teammate and may take some time to complete.
Step 1
Start the departure handover.
Identify the teammate who is leaving and begin the setup.
Step 2
Wait for them to join Relay and link their work apps.
They'll need to complete this step before the handover can be prepared.
Step 3
Create and pay.
Review and confirm to create the AI, then complete payment.
Select a departing employee
Initiate the digital asset preservation process for a departing employee.

Create Digital Employee
Data preparation complete. Confirm creation of the knowledge asset.
Digital Employee
Lead Tier·Shawn Guo Knowledge Base
What is it?
A Digital Employee is a persistent AI asset that preserves the work memory and decision logic of your team members.
What can it do?
Query institutional knowledge instantly
Understand deep decision logic from archives
Maintain project continuity after handover

Create a new AI
Pick how you'd like to start.
For yourself
Build your own AI with your own data — you'll pick an avatar, role, and link the apps you use.
Invite a colleague
Best for offboarding — capture someone's knowledge before they leave. They link their tools, then hand it back to you.
Invite a colleague
They'll get an email to join Relay and link their tools. You'll get a "Needs Review" card when they're done.
Relay is requesting access to your account to learn your work patterns.
